flatpak.reason: Required by the currently verified Bottles profile.

user_namespaces.reason: Required by the verified Flatpak execution route.

network_namespaces.reason: Required for the verified offline launcher.

ntsync.reason: The verified bottle is configured with ntsync; fallbacks are not yet tested.

x11.reason: The tested bottle has native Wayland disabled.

notes: This contract records the verified profile, not all possible future recovery paths.
